text:
theDOGS debuts as the ending theme for the anime film, Attack on Titan Part 2: Jiyuu no Tsubasa, and 1st song on theDOGS. It is also the 16th and final track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .
Lyrics by Benjamin & mpi
Sung by Mpi
Musicians
Drums: YU "masshoi" YAMAUCHI
Bass: TOSHINO TANABE
Guitars: HIROSHI IIMURO
Violin: KOICHIRO MUROYA
Piano, Keyboards & All Other Instruments: 

Musical motifs

The chorus (1:06-1:28) and ostinato (plays throughout the whole song) are motifs that appear in the tracks 2Volt (ostinato at 0:26-1:19, 3:07-3:22 and 3:59-4:13, chorus at 4:37-5:25) and TheWeightOfLives (ostinato at 3:52-4:21, 4:36-4:50, and 6:42-7:09, chorus at 2:46-3:37).
